name: ai-native-cowork
description: Work-collaboration harness for Claude Code. /cowork-sprint (plan→execute sprint orchestrator) + /cowork-insights (AI session reports) + /cowork-commit (verbatim directive logs) + /cowork-doc-sync (+/cowork-doc-init) (repo docs/ organization); integrates with www-wiki / taise / bkit when present, runs standalone otherwise.
author: ww-w-ai
